use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and dashboards
Destructive action buttons with red styling for delete/remove operations
Outline buttons for secondary actions alongside primary CTAs
Ghost buttons for subtle, text-like interactions in navigation or toolbars
ai_summary: A Shadcn-style atomic button component with a comprehensive variant system including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants. Features multiple sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) and supports disabled states, focus outlines for accessibility, and composition via the asChild prop using Radix UI Slot.
